title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on systems underlying Renaissance trials. The episode explores hidden organizational structures and patterns in historical legal proceedings.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about the organizational systems that shaped Renaissance trials. The conversation examines the hidden structures and recurring patterns behind historical legal proceedings, framing courtroom outcomes as products of institutional design rather than isolated events. The episode connects how those underlying systems operated to the way Renaissance justice functioned in practice.
